items.claim: Aleandro Costa is more dangerous than Cody Duran.
items.quote: Costa to me, the far more dangerous fighter.

items.claim: Aleandro Costa has sharp boxing skills.
items.quote: They got sharp boxing on the feet.

items.claim: Aleandro Costa lacks elite footwork for cutting off the cage.
items.quote: Not the best footwork, right? At kind of cutting the cage off

items.claim: Aleandro Costa possesses a great chin.
Ryan Gandra leaves himself vulnerable to straight shots due to his wide, looping punching style.
items.quote: he leaves so many openings to allow a guy to throw good straight shots down the middle to be able to find the chin.

items.claim: Ryan Gandra is vulnerable to being taken down.
items.quote: he also leaves himself very vulnerable to being taken down

items.claim: Zachary Reese has poor defensive responsibility.
items.quote: I don't think he's very responsible defensively.

items.claim: Zachary Reese's chin is often left exposed in the air.
items.quote: His chin is up in the air.

items.claim: Damen Panass demonstrates high-level technical striking, specifically his jab-cross combination.
items.quote: And this guy threw just a beautiful jab, right hand right behind it.

items.claim: Cesar Almeida has poor head movement.
items.quote: He doesn't move his head very well
